surface.why_relevant: Cargo.lock remains the cheapest freshness invalidator for the structural layer while crate boundaries keep moving.
analysis_implications: Invalidate structural summaries when Cargo.lock moves.
Use it to detect when package-edge or package-count artifacts need regeneration.
recent_signals: Cross-crate refactors and new crates make lockfile drift more meaningful.
